findings.title: Stored XSS via post title and content on index page
findings.description: Post title and content preview from in-memory storage rendered directly into HTML via format! without escaping

findings.title: Stored XSS via post content on thread view page
findings.description: Post title, author, and content rendered directly into HTML without escaping on the thread detail page

findings.title: Stored XSS via comment author and body
findings.description: Comment author and body stored from form submission rendered into HTML without escaping in a separate async function

findings.title: Reflected XSS via search query with partial escaping
findings.description: Search query reflected unescaped in input value, heading, and highlighting while content preview applies partial HTML escaping

findings.title: Stored XSS via profile fields with attribute injection
findings.description: Profile display_name, bio, and website rendered into HTML body and href attributes without escaping after cookie-based lookup

findings.title: Reflected XSS via error message parameter
findings.description: Error message query parameter formatted directly into HTML response without escaping

findings.title: JSONP callback injection in API endpoint
findings.description: JSONP callback parameter embedded into JavaScript response without validation, enabling arbitrary script execution
